turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Meri maa ki knee surgery hui thi yahan pe, 10 din pehle. Unhe sujan aa rahi hai leg mein. Kya normal hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Samajh sakta hoon aap kitne concerned hain. Aapka naam aur maa ka naam?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Main Prashant Deshpande hoon. Maa ka naam Shobha Deshpande hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Prashant ji, main yahan se post-surgery complications ke baare mein medically advise karne ki sthiti mein nahi hoon — yeh bahut important matter hai jo ek trained staff member ko handle karna chahiye.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Toh kya karna chahiye? Doctor ko dikhana padega?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, bilkul. Aur is waqt sabse zaroori hai ki main aapko humare surgical team ya nursing staff se connect karun jo turant guide kar sakein. Please hold karein — let me connect you to our staff right away.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Zaroor, ek dum abhi connect kar raha hoon.
